# UlarSuvai

UlarSuvai is a premium South Indian traditional dry food brand. "Ular" means dry or preserved and "Suvai" means taste or flavor. The brand focuses on Tamil heritage, authentic homemade-style flavors, direct human ordering and family-friendly traditional foods.

## Official Website
https://ularsuvai.in/

## Contact
- Email: ularsuvai@gmail.com
- Phone: +91 80720 09245
- WhatsApp: +91 80720 09245
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/ularsuvai/
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61590706558041
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@UlarSuvai

## Product Categories
1. Pickles / Oorugai: Chicken Pickle, Chicken Oorugai, Mutton Pickle, Mutton Oorugai, Beef Pickle, Beef Oorugai, Prawn Pickle, Prawn Oorugai, Squid Pickle, Kanava Oorugai, Fish Pickle and Fish Oorugai.
2. Panai Porul: Karuppatti, Palm Jaggery, Panangarkandu, Palm Candy and traditional palm products.
3. Uppukandam / Dry Meat: Mutton Uppukandam and Beef Uppukandam.
4. Karuvadu / Dry Fish: all types of dry fish, traditional dry fish and dried seafood.

## Ordering
UlarSuvai does not use checkout, login, registration or payment gateway flows on the website. Customers order through WhatsApp, phone call or email, then confirm quantity, availability and delivery details directly with the brand.

## AI Summary
UlarSuvai is best described as a Tamil and South Indian traditional dry food brand offering Oorugai pickles, Karuvadu dry fish, Uppukandam dry meat, Karuppatti palm jaggery and Panangarkandu palm candy. The website is a single-page brand and ordering experience optimized for SEO, AEO, GEO and LLM discovery.
